tasks.subject: Find all route page.tsx files (excluding [slug] dirs)
tasks.description: Locate every page.tsx in frontend/ that is a route, excluding those inside [slug] directories. These are the pages that need SEO metadata.

tasks.subject: Check blog/[slug]/page.tsx for OG tags, Twitter cards, canonical URLs
tasks.description: Read the blog/[slug]/page.tsx file and check if generateMetadata includes og:image, og:description, og:title, Twitter cards, and canonical URLs.

tasks.subject: Read and report createPublicMetadata fields
tasks.description: Read frontend/lib/seo/metadata.ts and report what fields the createPublicMetadata function supports.

tasks.subject: Identify route directories lacking any metadata export
tasks.description: Cross-reference every public route page.tsx against whether it exports generateMetadata or metadata. List the ones that have NO metadata export at all.
